untranslatable_reason: This signal requires classification of stocks into value/glamour portfolios and conditioning on macroeconomic states (real GNP growth and unemployment changes). These require external fundamental data and economic regime classification not available in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list (which contains only technical price/volume indicators). The signal cannot be expressed using only price-based technical indicators.
translation_notes: SSRN_227016_13 is a fundamental value-reversion strategy requiring: (1) Value factor classification (P/E, P/B, dividend yield ratios), (2) Real GNP growth rates (macro data), (3) Unemployment rate changes (macro data), (4) 4-state economic regime mapping. None of these inputs are available in the technical indicator set. A proper implementation would require external data feeds for fundamental ratios and macroeconomic indicators. The quarterly rebalancing frequency (63 trading days) is noted.
